title: dryas sylvatica
intro: Dryas sylvatica, also known as mountain avens, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is native to alpine regions in Europe, Asia, and North America, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant's roots and leaves have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Dryas sylvatica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote health and well-being, and are also used to treat conditions such as arthritis and respiratory infections.
